words.exampleBs: Namaz je stub vjere.
words.exampleEn: Prayer is the pillar of the religion.

words.exampleArabic: الصِّيَامُ فِي رَمَضَانَ فَرِيضَةٌ عَلَى كُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ.
words.exampleBs: Post u ramazanu je obaveza svakog muslimana.
words.exampleEn: Fasting in Ramadan is an obligation on every Muslim.

words.exampleBs: Zekat je jedan od stubova islama.
words.exampleEn: Zakat is a pillar of Islam.

words.exampleArabic: الْحَجُّ فَرِيضَةٌ عَلَى الْمُسْتَطِيعِ مَرَّةً فِي الْعُمْرِ.
words.exampleBs: Hadž je obaveza jednom u životu za onoga ko je u mogućnosti.
words.exampleEn: Hajj is an obligation once in a lifetime for those who are able.

words.exampleArabic: يَذْهَبُ إِلَى الْمَسْجِدِ لِأَدَاءِ الصَّلَوَاتِ الْخَمْسِ.
words.exampleBs: Odlazi u džamiju radi klanjanja pet namaza.
words.exampleEn: He goes to the mosque to perform the five prayers.

words.exampleBs: Imam predvodi klanjače u namazu.
words.exampleEn: The imam leads the worshippers in prayer.

words.exampleArabic: صَلَاةُ الْجُمُعَةِ وَاجِبَةٌ عَلَى كُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ بَالِغٍ.
words.exampleBs: Džuma namaz je obavezan za svakog punoljetnog muslimana.
words.exampleEn: Friday prayer is obligatory for every adult Muslim.

words.exampleBs: Namaz nije valjan bez abdesta.
words.exampleEn: Prayer is not valid without ablution.

words.exampleArabic: يُؤَذِّنُ الْمُؤَذِّنُ خَمْسَ مَرَّاتٍ فِي الْيَوْمِ.
words.exampleBs: Mujezin uči ezan pet puta dnevno.
words.exampleEn: The muezzin calls the adhan five times a day.

words.exampleArabic: السُّجُودُ أَقْرَبُ مَا يَكُونُ الْعَبْدُ مِنْ رَبِّهِ.
words.exampleBs: Sedžda je trenutak kada je rob najbliži svom Gospodaru.
words.exampleEn: Prostration is when the servant is closest to his Lord.

words.exampleBs: Rukuu je jedan od stubova namaza.
words.exampleEn: Bowing (ruku) is a pillar of the prayer.

words.exampleBs: Strpljenje je velika vrlina u islamu.
words.exampleEn: Patience is a great virtue in Islam.

words.exampleBs: Zahvalnost za blagodati ih uvećava.
words.exampleEn: Gratitude for blessings increases them.

words.exampleArabic: التَّوَكُّلُ عَلَى اللهِ بَعْدَ الْأَخْذِ بِالْأَسْبَابِ.
words.exampleBs: Oslanjanje na Allaha dolazi nakon poduzimanja mjera.
words.exampleEn: Reliance on Allah comes after taking necessary steps.

words.exampleArabic: الْإِحْسَانُ أَنْ تَعْبُدَ اللهَ كَأَنَّكَ تَرَاهُ.
words.exampleBs: Ihsan je da robuješ Allahu kao da Ga vidiš.
words.exampleEn: Ihsan is to worship Allah as if you see Him.

words.exampleBs: Iskrenost je uvjet prihvatanja ibadeta.
words.exampleEn: Sincerity is a condition for the acceptance of worship.

words.exampleBs: Dova je oružje vjernika.
words.exampleEn: Supplication is the weapon of the believer.

words.exampleBs: Zikr donosi spokoj srcu.
words.exampleEn: Dhikr brings tranquility to the heart.

words.exampleBs: Čovjek je stvoren radi ibadeta.
words.exampleEn: The human was created for worship.

words.exampleBs: Musliman traži halal opskrbu.
words.exampleEn: The Muslim seeks a halal livelihood.

words.exampleArabic: يَجْتَنِبُ الْمُسْلِمُ كُلَّ مَا هُوَ حَرَامٌ.
words.exampleBs: Musliman se kloni svega što je haram.
words.exampleEn: The Muslim avoids everything that is forbidden.

words.exampleBs: Vrata tevbe su otvorena svakom robu.
words.exampleEn: The door of repentance is open to every servant.

words.exampleBs: Klanja pet namaza dnevno.
words.exampleEn: He prays five prayers a day.

words.exampleBs: Cijela porodica je postila u ramazanu.
words.exampleEn: The whole family fasted in Ramadan.

words.exampleBs: Uzeo je abdest prije sabah namaza.
words.exampleEn: He performed ablution before the dawn prayer.

words.exampleBs: Molio je Allaha za ozdravljenje i zdravlje.
words.exampleEn: He supplicated to Allah for healing and well-being.

words.exampleBs: Pokajao se Allahu i tražio oprosta.
words.exampleEn: He repented to Allah and sought forgiveness.

words.exampleBs: Mnogo traži Allahov oprost tokom dana.
words.exampleEn: He seeks Allah's forgiveness often during his day.

words.exampleArabic: تَصَدَّقَ عَلَى الْفُقَرَاءِ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ.
words.exampleBs: Dao je sadaku siromašnima u toku ramazana.
words.exampleEn: He gave charity to the poor during Ramadan.

words.exampleBs: Spominje Allaha u svakom stanju.
words.exampleEn: He remembers Allah in every situation.

words.exampleArabic: الْمُؤْمِنُ يَثِقُ بِاللهِ فِي كُلِّ أَمْرٍ.
words.exampleBs: Vjernik se oslanja na Allaha u svakoj stvari.
words.exampleEn: The believer trusts Allah in every matter.

words.exampleBs: Iskreno djelo je prihvaćeno kod Allaha.
words.exampleEn: The sincere deed is accepted by Allah.

words.exampleArabic: الْعَمَلُ الصَّالِحُ يَنْفَعُ صَاحِبَهُ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Dobro djelo koristi svom tvorcu na dunjaluku i ahiretu.
words.exampleEn: The righteous deed benefits its doer in this life and the next.

words.exampleBs: Pobožna osoba kloni se Allahovih grijeha.
words.exampleEn: The pious person avoids disobeying Allah.

words.exampleArabic: الْمُسْلِمُ الشَّاكِرُ يَرَى النِّعَمَ فِي كُلِّ شَيْءٍ.
words.exampleBs: Zahvalni musliman vidi blagodati u svemu.
words.exampleEn: The grateful Muslim sees blessings in everything.

words.exampleBs: Strpljivi nađe izlaz nakon teškoće.
words.exampleEn: The patient person finds relief after hardship.

words.en: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful
words.exampleArabic: يَبْدَأُ الْمُسْلِمُ كُلَّ عَمَلٍ بِبِسْمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ.
words.exampleBs: Musliman započinje svaki posao s bismillom.
words.exampleEn: The Muslim begins every action with Bismillah.

words.exampleArabic: يَقُولُ الْحَمْدُ للهِ بَعْدَ كُلِّ نِعْمَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Govori el-hamdulillah nakon svake blagodati.
words.exampleEn: He says Alhamdulillah after every blessing.

words.exampleBs: Posjetiću te sutra, inšallah.
words.exampleEn: I will visit you tomorrow, God willing.

words.exampleArabic: يَقُولُ سُبْحَانَ اللهِ عِنْدَ رُؤْيَةِ الْعَجَائِبِ.
words.exampleBs: Govori subhanallah kad vidi nešto čudesno.
words.exampleEn: He says Subhanallah when he sees something amazing.

words.exampleArabic: يُكَبِّرُ الْمُسْلِمُ فِي الصَّلَاةِ وَفِي السُّرُورِ.
words.exampleBs: Musliman uči tekbir u namazu i u radosti.
words.exampleEn: The Muslim says Allahu Akbar in prayer and in joy.

words.bs: Zaista smo Allahovi i Njemu se vraćamo (inna lillahi)
words.en: Indeed, to Allah we belong and to Him we return
words.exampleArabic: يَقُولُ الْمُسْلِمُ إِنَّا للهِ عِنْدَ الْمُصِيبَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Musliman govori inna lillahi kada ga zadesi nevolja.
words.exampleEn: The Muslim says inna lillahi when afflicted with calamity.
